items.title: Learn Fundamental Analysis Basics
items.description: Study the basics of reading financial statements and understanding key metrics
items.success_metric: Can analyze a company's balance sheet, income statement, and cash flow

items.title: Practice Stock Screening
items.description: Use free stock screening tools to find undervalued companies
items.success_metric: Build a watchlist of 10 potentially undervalued stocks with analysis notes

items.title: Study Berkshire Annual Letters
items.description: Read and analyze Buffett's annual letters to shareholders
items.success_metric: Summarize key investing principles from 5 annual letters

items.title: Build Paper Portfolio
items.description: Create a mock portfolio with detailed investment theses
items.success_metric: Document 5 investment theses with buy/sell criteria

items.title: Weekly Reflection Habit
items.description: Write weekly reflection on investment learnings and market observations
